steps: Add 1 L Milli-Q H 2 O to a clean media bottle
Add 2.86 g H 3 BO 3 Boric acid Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP1681
Add 1.81 g MnCl 2 *4H 2 O Manganese chloride Fisher Scientific Catalog #7773-01-5
Add 0.222 g ZnSO 4 *7H 2 O Zinc sulfate Contributed by users
Add 0.39 g NaMoO 4 *2H 2 O Sodium molybdate dihydrate Contributed by users
Add 0.079 g CuSO 4 *5H 2 O Copper Sulfate P212121
Add 49.4 mg Co(NO 3 ) 2 *6H 2 O Cobalt (II) nitrate hexahydrate Fisher Scientific Catalog #10026-22-9
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
